notes: Broad baseline terms for the artificial/natural/real/fake/synthetic field.

strongest_terms: artificial life; artificial manner; artificial society; artificial tears; artificial manners
notes: Social, emotional, aesthetic, and behavioral phrases that may need context review for affected or insincere senses.
Comparators for artificial against fake, real, realistic, genuine, synthetic, imitation, simulated, and related terms.

strongest_terms: artificial intelligence; natural selection; natural language; natural life; artificial light
notes: Paired artificial/natural phrases collected for later side-by-side review.

notes: Consumer, ingredient, packaging, and processed-product phrases.

strongest_terms: all natural; without artificial; free from artificial; no artificial colors; nothing artificial
notes: Absence claims where artificial may become marketable by omission.

notes: Optional material, chemical, dye, product, substitute, and copy phrases.
